subcodes.first_line: O thou who art resigned to the divine decree! Though calamities and afflictions be grievous trials and dire tests, yet if thou shouldst ponder and reflect [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای راضی بقضای الهی مصائب و رزایاء هر چند مصاعب و بلایاست لکن اگر تفکر و تدبر
subcodes.subjects: @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @theodicy; the mystery of evil; of suffering, @consolation and comfort
